title: Roles of UVM testbench components
description: The driver, monitor, sequencer, scoreboard, and agent each have a distinct role in stimulating and checking a design.
body: Use when reasoning about where verification logic belongs. Do not blur driving and checking into one component, since separation is what keeps the testbench reusable and observable. Actions: place stimulus generation in the sequencer and driver, observation in the monitor, and checking in the scoreboard. Validation signals include each component owning a single responsibility and the monitor independent of the driver. Risk boundary: a monitor that reuses driver state cannot independently confirm behavior, so flag any checking that depends on the stimulus path.
